query:
INSERT INTO
                    deal_sli_manifest_snapshots (
                        deal_id,
                        manifest_hash,
                        manifest_location,
                        raw_content,
                        parsed_content,
                        content_byte_length,
                        computed_hash
                    )
               VALUES
                    ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, $7)
               RETURNING
                    id
